c.d: Ability of the app to sync notes and be accessible on multiple operating systems and devices
Support for tags, notebooks, sections, and search functionalities to organize and retrieve notes efficiently
Support for handwriting, typed text, images, sketches, diagrams, and audio notes
Options for sharing, real-time collaboration, and publishing notes online
Free, freemium, or paid pricing plans including in-app purchases or subscriptions
UI design quality including distraction-free modes and ease of use
Ability to convert handwritten notes to editable text reliably
Support for exporting notes into multiple formats like PDF, DOCX, Markdown, and text
